summary: Comprehensive testing of Sarthak-AI Sovereign multi-tenant consular automation platform completed successfully. All core features including Super Admin login, company creation, Local Admin dashboard, consular bot with OpenAI GPT-5.2 integration, progress stepper, voice/camera inputs, and WhatsApp webhook are fully functional.
passed_tests: API Health Check - Backend responding correctly
Super Admin Authentication - Login with superadmin@sarthak.ai working
Multi-tenant Company Creation - New companies created successfully
Local Admin Authentication - Company admin login working
User Registration - New user accounts created
Consular Bot Chat - OpenAI GPT-5.2 integration working with proper responses
Local Admin Dashboard - All tabs and features accessible
Feature Toggles - Voice and camera settings configurable
Document Upload - File upload functionality working
Landing Page Navigation - All buttons and links functional
Progress Stepper - 4-step process (Register → Upload → Verify → Sign) visible
Bot Avatar - Professional avatar with online status indicator
Voice Input Button - Microphone button present and functional
Camera Interface - Document capture dialog working
Authentication Token Persistence - Login sessions maintained
Super Admin Analytics - Company statistics displayed correctly
